overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through tall prairie grass among a herd of bison, then continuing across open grassland toward a distant wooden settlement under a dramatic partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass prairie with grazing bison herd

events.description: character walks closely past a large bison grazing on the left side
character moves past the main bison group and continues into more open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass among a herd of bison, navigating around the large animals

notable_agents.action: large bison grazing in the tall grass, walking past the character on the left
bison grazing peacefully in the field

entered.detail: dense tall green grass covering the ground
rustic wooden frontier buildings visible on the distant hillside
solitary oak trees dotting the rolling landscape
gently sloping green hills extending to the horizon
dramatic white and gray clouds filling the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense tall grass in an open prairie, surrounded by a herd of grazing bison. A large bison passes close by on the left as the character moves through the herd. Wooden ranch buildings and scattered trees are visible on the distant rolling hills under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: flock of birds flies overhead across the cloudy sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open prairie toward the distant wooden buildings and trees

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the grass on the left side

segments.scene_description: Having left the bison behind, the character continues walking through open grassland toward a distant frontier settlement. A dirt path becomes visible on the left, and the wooden ranch buildings grow larger as the character approaches. A flock of birds flies across the dramatic cloudy sky overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wild prairie that gradually transitions into an approach toward a frontier settlement. It begins with the character navigating dense tall grass while surrounded by a herd of grazing bison, one of which passes closely on the left. As the character leaves the herd behind, the terrain opens into wide grassland where a dirt path emerges on the left. The scene then shifts focus toward the horizon as the distant wooden ranch buildings grow larger and more defined against the rolling hills. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum under a dramatic cloudy sky as a flock of birds flies overhead.
